MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Janet Pond.
Appearances:
Michael Byron Cohen, Esq. for Plaintiff James Hickey also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Tracie Moore. Proposed Judgment submitted and under submission.
